notes: Solid, complete Snake implementation with proper 180° reversal prevention, progressive speed, high score persistence, pause/restart, audio feedback, and polished head-eyes detail; minor issue is the variable name collision (cx used for both canvas context and center-x coordinate, though it works due to scoping).
Excellent implementation with great visual polish and sound, though it lacks an input queue for rapid cornering which can cause dropped inputs.

A solid and complete snake implementation with proper states and collision logic, but it is not flawless due to simplistic presentation, potential multi-input direction edge cases within a single tick, and a likely broken audio init path in some browsers.
